name: 1. Lotus
content:
Title: Vietnam Film Festival

URL Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnam_Film_Festival

Published Time: 2009-12-08T07:26:52Z

Markdown Content:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Liên hoan phim Việt Nam

(Vietnam Film Festival)| Location | [Vietnam](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnam "Vietnam") |
| --- |
| Founded | 17 August 1970; 55 years ago |
| Awards | [Golden Lotus](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Golden_Lotus_Prize_(Vietnam_Film_Festival) "Golden Lotus Prize (Vietnam Film Festival)") |
| No. of films | 74 in [2019](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/21st_Vietnam_Film_Festival "21st Vietnam Film Festival") |
| Language | [Vietnamese](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnamese_language "Vietnamese language") |
| Website | [Official Website](http://lienhoanphim.bvhttdl.gov.vn/) |

The **Vietnam Film Festival** ([Vietnamese](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnamese_language "Vietnamese language"): **Liên hoan phim Việt Nam**), founded in 1970, is a domestic [film festival](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Film_festival "Film festival") of [Vietnam](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnam "Vietnam"). It is considered as the major event of [Vietnamese cinema](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cinema_of_Vietnam "Cinema of Vietnam") with awards for numerous categories ranging from [feature film](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Feature_film "Feature film") to [documentary film](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Documentary_film "Documentary film"), [animated film](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Animated_film "Animated film"). The festival is held for each two or three years in different host cities all over Vietnam.

The first Vietnam Film Festival was held from August 18 to August 25, 1970, in Hanoi following an issue of Vietnamese Ministry of Culture with the purpose of "encouraging the development of the national cinema". For each festival, there are several juries of 7 to 11 members for different categories of [feature film](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Feature_film "Feature film"), [direct-to-video](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Direct-to-video "Direct-to-video"), [animated film](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Animated_film "Animated film") and [documentary film](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Documentary_film "Documentary film"). The most prestigious prize of the festival is the [Golden Lotus](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Golden_Lotus_Prize_(Vietnam_Film_Festival) "Golden Lotus Prize (Vietnam Film Festival)") (Bông sen vàng) following by the Silver Lotus and the Jury Prize.

During this period, film festivals were organized in a simple manner due to an [ongoing war](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnam_War "Vietnam War") at the time. The first festival was held in 1970 with the criterion of summarizing four years of [resistance against the US](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnam_War#Gulf_of_Tonkin_and_Johnson's_escalation,_1963%E2%80%931969 "Vietnam War") (1965–1969). The second festival in 1973 was just in time to celebrate the 20th anniversary of t

Along with laundry facilities, this smoke-free hotel has a 24-hour front desk and tour/ticket assistance. WiFi in public areas is free. Other amenities include a front-desk safe. Danang Beach 2 Hotel offers 10 air-conditioned accommodations, which are accessible via exterior corridors and feature minibars and complimentary bottled water. 32-inch flat-screen televisions come with cable channels. Bathrooms include showers, slippers, complimentary toiletries, and hair dryers. Guests can surf the web using the complimentary wireless Internet access. Housekeeping is provided daily. The recreational activities listed below are available either on site or nearby; fees may apply.

8.4

Very good rating

Based on 459 verified guest reviews

| General information |
| Location | [Da Nang](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Da_Nang "Da Nang"), [Vietnam](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnam "Vietnam") |
| Coordinates | ![Image 3: Show location on an interactive map](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/55/WMA_button2b.png/20px-WMA_button2b.png)[16°07′14″N 108°18′22″E / 16.1205°N 108.30616°E](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=InterContinental_Danang_Sun_Peninsula_Resort&params=16.1205_N_108.30616_E_type:landmark) |
| Opening | June 1, 2012 |
| Owner | [Sun Group](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sun_Group_(Vietnam) "Sun Group (Vietnam)")[[2]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/InterContinental_Danang_Sun_Peninsula_Resort#cite_note-2) |
| Operator | [InterContinental Hotels Group](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IHG_Hotels_%26_Resorts "IHG Hotels & Resorts") |
| Design and construction |
| Architect | Bill Bensley[[1]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/InterContinental_Danang_Sun_Peninsula_Resort#cite_note-HM-1) |
| Other information |
| Number of rooms | 197[[3]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/InterContinental_Danang_Sun_Peninsula_Resort#cite_note-CN1-3) |
| Number of restaurants | 4 |
| Number of bars | 2 |
| Website |
| [www.danang.intercontinental.com](https://www.danang.intercontinental.com/) |

**InterContinental Danang Sun Peninsula Resort** is a resort & spa in [Da Nang](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Da_Nang "Da Nang"), [Vietnam](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnam "Vietnam"). It is one of the resorts under the management of [InterContinental Hotels Group](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IHG_Hotels_%26_Resorts "IHG Hotels & Resorts") (IHG) in Vietnam. The resort opened on June 1, 2012. _[Condé Nast Traveler]

name: 7. My Khe
content:
Title: My Khe II Hotel, Da Nang - Official Site | Home

URL Source: http://mykhe2hoteldana.com/

Markdown Content:
###### My Khe II Hotel

## WELCOME TO MY KHE II HOTEL DA NANG

###### My Khe II Hotel

## WELCOME TO MY KHE II HOTEL DA NANG

prev

next

###### Welcome to

##### My Khe II Hotel is located in the most beautiful beach in Vietnam, one of the top tourist attractions of Da Nang city. International tourists come here for convalescence and relaxation. You will enjoy cool breeze blowing in from the blue sea at sunrise. The ridges sway with the wind and the fine white sand stretching along the coast are known as the most beautiful in the planet. With 72 rooms designed equivalent 3-star, fully amenities, you will find a perfect place for your vacation or business trip in Danang. Furthermore, we have a large garden convenient for your parking.

![Image 1: aboutUs](http://mykhe2hoteldana.com/media/1141/aboutus-my-khe-2.jpg)

![Image 2: aboutUs](http://mykhe2hoteldana.com/media/1142/about-us-my-khe-2-hotel-da-nang.jpg)

##### Bar & Drink

## SUITE SEA VIEW

*   ~~1.400.000 VND~~980.000 VND (Giảm 30%)
*   02 suites with balconies and sea view, each room has an area of 60m2, has 1 living room and 1 bedroom with 2 beds, equipped with luxurious furnishings, it is a great place for you to unleash your soul in the natural scenery of blue ocean waves and endless stretches.

[View Details](http://mykhe2hoteldana.com/en/rooms/suite-sea-view/)

## SENIOR TWIN SEA VIEW

*   ~~1.200.000 VND~~900.000 VND (Giám 30%)
*   With 06 rooms with sea view upgraded in 2019. All rooms have an area of 32m2, 4 rooms with 2 beds and 2 rooms with 3 beds 1.2m.

[View Details](http://mykhe2hoteldana.com/en/rooms/senior-twin-sea-view/)

## FAMILY SUITE

*   ~~1.700.000 VND~~1.190.000 VND (Giảm 30%)
*   With 03 Family Suite rooms with an area of 50m2, equipped with luxurious amenities and furnishings, there is a private kitchen for your family, that is a good choice for your long stay in at Da Nang. All rooms have sea view.

[View Details](http://mykhe2hoteldana.com/en/rooms/family-suite/)

## SUITE SEA VIEW

*   ~~1.400.000 VND~~980.000 VND (Giảm 30%)
*   02 suites with balconies and sea view, each room has an area of 60m2, has 1 living room and 1 bedroom with 2 beds, equipped with luxurious furnishings, it is a great place for you to unleash your soul in the natural scener
